storylines.title: US-Israel Military Operations Against Iran and Death of Supreme Leader Khamenei
storylines.description: A major escalation in Middle East tensions involving coordinated US-Israeli military strikes against Iran, targeting nuclear facilities and leadership, coinciding with or resulting in the reported death of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei

storylines.title: Trump Administration's AI Supply Chain Security Crackdown
storylines.description: The Trump administration designates AI company Anthropic as a supply-chain security risk and orders government agencies to cease using the company's services

storylines.title: Netflix-Warner Bros. Discovery Acquisition Collapse
storylines.description: Netflix withdraws its bid to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery citing financial concerns

storylines.title: Austin Bar Shooting Incident
storylines.description: A violent incident at an Austin bar resulting in multiple fatalities and injuries

storylines.title: Xiaomi 17 Ultra Smartphone Launch
storylines.description: Xiaomi announces its new flagship smartphone with Leica camera partnership and powerbank accessory
